message:
feat(web): add automatic jargon term detection and tooltips

- Add findJargonInText() to jargon.ts for auto-detecting terms in text
- Create reusable JargonText component for wrapping text with tooltips
- Integrate into TranscriptViewer (BrennerQuote, InterviewerQuestion, Paragraph)
- Component supports both jargon tooltips and search highlights simultaneously
- Works across transcript, can be reused on distillations and other pages

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
